name: Cuscowilla
description: Come play pickleball at Cuscowilla in Eatonton, GA! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play.

name: Eagle Pointe Pickleball (LO)
description: Eagle Pointe Pickleball (LO) is a place to play pickleball in Eatonton, GA. There is 1 outdoor concrete court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The court is private. Amenities include lights.

name: Hoot Owl Pickleball
description: Hoot Owl Pickleball is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Eatonton, GA. There is 1 outdoor concrete court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court is private. The facility includes amenities like food, lights, restrooms, and water.

name: LOPC Pickleball (Lake Oconee Presbyterian Church)
description: LOPC Pickleball (Lake Oconee Presbyterian Church) is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Eatonton, GA. There are 3 outdoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Players have access to lights.

name: Putnam Rec Center
description: Come play pickleball at Putnam Rec Center in Eatonton, GA! There are 6 asphalt courts. 2 are indoors and 4 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, lights, wheelchair accessibility, and trainers or lessons. The courts are free.
